questions.questionText: What is the best Light Roast, Medium Roast or Dark Roast (This isnt a subjective question at all)?
What is the best: Drip Coffee, Espresso, French Press?
How do you properly make an Espresso?
choices: Boil water and pour it over ground cofee
Grind coffee extra fine put it into a puck and use a special machine to push water at extra fast speed through the puck
Boil water drink it and then eat the coffee beans
